empty.dmBody: Send a message below to start the conversation.
empty.channelBody: Be the first to say something — type a message below to get the channel going.

readOnly.noPermission: You do not have permission to send messages in this channel

create.title: Create a Poll
create.questionPlaceholder: What do you want to ask?
create.multiVoteSub: Voters can pick more than one option

login.title: Welcome back!
login.subtitle: We're so excited to see you again!

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.checkEmailBody: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent a password reset link.

reset.title: Set New Password
reset.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
reset.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters
reset.successBody: You can now log in with your new password.

verify.verifiedBody: Your email has been verified. You can now use Jolkr.
verify.failedSubtitle: The link may have expired. Try requesting a new one.
verify.pendingBody: We sent a verification link to {email}. Check your inbox and click the link to continue.
verify.sentMessage: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

account.title: My Account
account.passwordHelp: Keep your account secure with a strong password and two-factor authentication.
account.deleteHelp: Deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone.

privacy.title: Privacy & Safety
privacy.dmFilterDesc: Control who can send you direct messages.
privacy.allowFriendReqsDesc: Let others send you friend requests.
privacy.readReceiptsDesc: Show when you've read messages in DMs.
privacy.analyticsDesc: Help improve Jolkr by sending anonymous usage data.

connections.title: Connections
connections.intro: Connect your accounts to share your activity and unlock integrations.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.messageDisplayDesc: Compact mode shows more messages at once.
appearance.displayCompact: Compact — more messages visible at once
appearance.fontSizeDesc: Resize the text in chat messages.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.reducedMotionDesc: Minimise animations and transitions throughout the app.
accessibility.highContrastDesc: Increase contrast between text and background.
accessibility.roleColorsDesc: Display colour-coded role names in member lists.

voice.title: Voice & Video
voice.outputUnsupported: Output device selection is not supported in this browser.
voice.noiseSuppressionDesc: Filter out background noise during voice calls.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desktopDesc: Show notifications when the app is in the background.
notifications.soundsDesc: Play a sound when you receive a notification.
notifications.permissionDeniedToast: Notification permission denied — enable it in your browser/OS settings.
notifications.unsupportedToast: Desktop notifications are not supported in this environment.
notifications.mentionsDesc: Notify when someone mentions you in a channel.
notifications.dmsDesc: Notify for all new direct messages.
notifications.badgeDesc: Show unread count badge on the app icon.

keybinds.title: Keybinds
keybinds.intro: Default keyboard shortcuts. Custom keybinds coming soon.

language.title: Language
language.displayDesc: Choose the language used throughout the app.

overview.discoveryDesc: Make server discoverable in server browser

invites.emptyDesc: Create an invite above to start inviting people to your server.

bans.emptyDesc: Your server is clean! Banned users will appear here.

audit.emptyDesc: Audit log entries will appear here when server actions are performed.

delete.title: Delete Server
delete.warning: This action cannot be undone. All channels, messages, and data will be permanently deleted.

leaveConfirm.title: Leave Server
leaveConfirm.body: Are you sure you want to leave {serverName}? You won't be able to rejoin unless you have an invite.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Server
deleteConfirm.body: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {serverName}? This action cannot be undone.

overview.title: Channel Overview
overview.topicPlaceholder: Let everyone know what this channel is about
overview.systemNotice: This is a system channel and cannot be modified.
overview.slowmodeHint: Users can send one message per interval. 0 = disabled.

permissions.title: Channel Permissions
permissions.systemNotice: System channel permissions cannot be modified.

view_channels.label: View Channels
view_channels.desc: Allows members to view channels by default (excluding private channels).

manage_channels.label: Manage Channels
manage_channels.desc: Allows members to create, edit, or delete channels.

manage_server.label: Manage Server
manage_server.desc: Allows members to change server name, icon, and other settings.

kick_members.label: Kick Members
kick_members.desc: Allows members to kick other members from the server.

ban_members.label: Ban Members
ban_members.desc: Allows members to ban other members from the server.

manage_roles.label: Manage Roles
manage_roles.desc: Allows members to create new roles and edit or delete roles lower than their highest role.

create_invite.label: Create Invites
create_invite.desc: Allows members to create invite links to the server.

send_messages.label: Send Messages
send_messages.desc: Allows members to send messages in text channels.

manage_messages.label: Manage Messages
manage_messages.desc: Allows members to delete and pin messages in text channels.

embed_links.label: Embed Links
embed_links.desc: Allows members to embed links in messages.

attach_files.label: Attach Files
attach_files.desc: Allows members to attach files to messages.

add_reactions.label: Add Reactions
add_reactions.desc: Allows members to add reactions to messages.

read_message_history.label: Read Message History
read_message_history.desc: Allows members to read previous messages.

use_external_emojis.label: Use External Emojis
use_external_emojis.desc: Allows members to use emojis from other servers.

send_tts_messages.label: Send TTS Messages
send_tts_messages.desc: Allows members to send text-to-speech messages.

connect.label: Connect
connect.desc: Allows members to connect to voice channels.

speak.label: Speak
speak.desc: Allows members to speak in voice channels.

video.label: Video
video.desc: Allows members to share video in voice channels.

mute_members.label: Mute Members
mute_members.desc: Allows members to mute other members in voice channels.

deafen_members.label: Deafen Members
deafen_members.desc: Allows members to deafen other members in voice channels.

move_members.label: Move Members
move_members.desc: Allows members to move others between voice channels.

use_voice_activity.label: Use Voice Activity
use_voice_activity.desc: Allows members to use voice activity detection.

administrator.label: Administrator
administrator.desc: Grants all permissions and bypasses channel permissions. This is a dangerous permission!
